summary: Single Team subscriber Peacock scheduled/live non-subscribed teams - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a single team subscriber
AND there is a Peacock Game scheduled/in-progress without the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the Peacock game tile
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a message displays letting the user know where the game can be watched

**Peacock message:**
Watch on Peacock
This broadcast is available to watch only on Peacock. Open the Peacock app to watch now or download for your streaming device. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game. Live audio is available on MLB.TV. For more information visit https://mlb.tv/peacock
